_publications._publicationTitle: Pathogenic neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) RNA splicing resolved by targeted RNAseq.

_contextSnippet: For the nine samples with a known pathogenic splice-variant all expected (major) pathogenic splicing events were detected using QURNAs
details: Successfully detected all expected pathogenic splicing events in validation cohort with high enrichment scores and identified 24 of 25 previously reported normal splicing events
